name: The Iron League
agenda: Consolidate mercenary contracts and dominate the condotta market
keyNPCs: The Black Colonel — Legendary commander, not seen in months
The Veteran Sergeant — Counts scars like coins
resources: Mercenary companies, military intelligence, siege equipment, camp followers
hooks: Payday is late — morale is dropping
A condotta is threatening to flip sides mid-contract
The Black Colonel may be dead, but his banner still rides
description: The Iron League is a coalition of free companies, condottieri, and mercenary captains who sell steel to whoever can pay. They have no loyalty to any nation—only to the next payday. Their camps are ragged, their discipline iron, and their grudges longer than any contract.
territory: Acasia, Vhasia, and the Violet Steppe
